Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Service Delayed near Clark/Lake
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Clark/Lake due to sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Clark/Lake due to sick customer. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#22 Clark

#24 Wentworth

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
